cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello Kamala Devi, ji! Congratulations, you've been selected for a fantastic freelance writing opportunity with our company, ContentWriters Inc.!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, thank you... I'm a bit busy right now, can we make this quick, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, Kamala Devi! This is a great chance for you to work with some amazing clients and build your portfolio. We'll be sending over a contract for you to review.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds good. What kind of writing will I be doing?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You'll be working on a variety of projects, from blog posts to website content. We'll provide all the details in the contract. I'll send it over to you via email right away.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, got it. How long do I have to review it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Take your time, Kamala Devi. Just let us know when you're ready to proceed. We're excited to have you on board!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Kamala Devi, I hope you've had a chance to review the contract I sent over. I just need to walk you through a few things.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, I glanced at it. It looks fine, I guess. What did you want to discuss?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great! If you could please go to page 5, clause 8b. We just need to take care of a small payment for notary and legal verification of the contract before we can onboard you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Uh, okay... How much is the payment and what's it for again?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's just a small fee, Kamala Devi. The payment is 500 rupees, and it's for the notary and legal verification of the contract. This is just a standard procedure to ensure everything is in order.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I see. And how do I make this payment? Do I need to go to the bank, like my DCB Bank branch?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: No need to go to the bank, Kamala Devi. You can just make an online transfer. I'll send you the details via email.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds easy enough. But can I ask, is this payment really necessary?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 147s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A caller offers a freelance writing position. After the candidate agrees, the agent sends a complex "contract" via email. They then call and say, "Please go to page 5, clause 8b. You need to make a small payment for 'notary and legal verification' of this contract before we can onboard you."
